---
# Copy this whole folder to blog/your-post-slug/ to start a new post.
# The leading underscore makes Quarto skip this template when rendering, so it never shows up on the site or in the listing.
# Keep draft: true while you write. You will still see the post in `quarto preview` with a "Draft" banner. Set draft: false and render when it is ready, and it goes live.
title: "Your post title"
description: "One sentence that makes someone want to read it"
date: 2026-01-01              # publication date, format YYYY-MM-DD
categories: [leadership]      # one of: modelling, code, academia, productivity, reflections, leadership
author:
  - name: Thinh Ong
    url: https://thinhong.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-6772-9291
# image: share-card.jpg       # optional 1200x630 social card; drop the file in this folder
# image-alt: "Describe the share card for screen readers"
# title-block-banner: "url(/img/blog-art/banner-your-post.svg)"   # optional custom hero banner
# title-block-banner-color: white
citation:
  url: https://drthinhong.com/blog/your-post-slug/
draft: true
---

Open with the one idea a reader should not forget. Keep each paragraph on a single line, and let the voice be warm.

## The short version

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}

1. First point

2. Second point

3. Third point

:::

## 1. First point

Write the section here. One paragraph per line, short and plain.

## 2. Second point

...

## 3. Third point

...

## Acknowledgments

Thank the people who shaped these ideas.
